title: Fifth assistant district attorney; residency and voter registration
doc_html:
§465. Fifth assistant district attorney; residency and voter registration

           The office of fifth assistant district attorney is hereby created for the Twenty-First Judicial District.

           Added by Acts 1975, No. 554, §2.
doc_text:
§465.  Fifth assistant district attorney; residency and voter registration
The office of fifth assistant district attorney is hereby created for the
Twenty-First Judicial District.
Added by Acts 1975, No. 554, §2.
